Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Moonfall]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Moonfall is a ship that crashed into the Iron Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Moonfall is a starship equipped with plasma cannons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Moonfall has an audio implant interface for communication.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Moonfall is a voice that provides navigational inquiries to the Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — Moonfall is a scorpion-shaped ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — Moonfall is piloted by Varic Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — Moonfall communicates through speakers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — Moonfall is a scout frigate designed for speed on long Subspace runs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 7''' — Moonfall is a ship's computer that provides internal diagnostics and announcements.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — Moonfall is a ship owned by the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — Moonfall is a frigate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Moonfall is a starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — The protagonist's clothes were destroyed on Moonfall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Moonfall has plasma cannons.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — The Captain was previously relying on Moonfall’s sensors.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
